title: xanthophyllum pulchrum
intro: Xanthophyllum pulchrum is a plant species, also known as the 'Yellow Wood', belonging to the family Polygalaceae, and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum pulchrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to create infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
